items.label: Establish and Maintain Inventory
items.desc: Keep a list of all devices on the network.

items.label: Identify and Address Unauthorized Assets
items.desc: Scan for unauthorized devices and disconnect them.

items.label: Establish and Maintain a Data Inventory
items.desc: Know where sensitive data is stored.

items.label: Configure Data Access Control Lists
items.desc: Restrict data access to only those who need it.

items.label: Asset Management
items.desc: Data, personnel, devices, systems, and facilities are identified and managed.

items.label: Governance
items.desc: Policies and procedures are established and communicated.

items.label: Access Control
items.desc: Access to assets and facilities is limited to authorized users.

items.label: Protective Technology
items.desc: Technical security solutions are managed to ensure security.

items.label: Access Control
items.desc: Grant access based on business and security needs.

items.label: User Endpoint Devices
items.desc: Enforce security controls on laptops and mobiles.

items.label: Use of Privileged Utility Programs
items.desc: Limit access to programs that can override security controls.
